meta.title: Michael Doran on Iran's Role in the Syrian Refugee Crisis
meta.description: Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Michael Doran talks about Iranian influence in Syria and its role in the terrorism of the Assad regime in light of the Iran nuclear deal (JCPOA).
